name: Suspicious Execution of Gpscript Detected
description: Detection of gpscript.exe being executed with /logon or /startup parameters outside of expected Group Policy contexts, indicating potential defense evasion, persistence, or privilege escalation.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of when gpscript.exe was executed.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the gpscript.exe executable.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line arguments of gpscript.exe, including /logon or /startup.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which gpscript.exe was executed.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the event occurred.

parameters.name: ParentImage
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process of gpscript.exe.

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The Sysmon rule name that triggered the alert, if available.
